mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM music_like WHERE music_id = #{musicId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO music_like (music_id, user_id, create_time) VALUES (#{musicId}, #{userId}, #{createTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM music_like WHERE music_id = #{musicId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM music_like WHERE music_id = #{musicId}
